title: Claude Cowork setup: the only 2 files you need
summary: Cowork is a setup framework for Claude that uses two plain text files (CLAUDE.md and MEMORY.md) to manage instructions and persistent memory across sessions. CLAUDE.md routes to different workstations based on task type, while MEMORY.md stores active projects and key decisions for session-to-session continuity.
